zh.Sequeira, Braga, Braga, Portugal: 葡萄牙布拉加布拉加澤可拉
葡萄牙波爾圖白奧桑塔 萊奧卡迪亞
zh.lifeSummary: 當Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado"於大約1170年出生在葡萄牙艾維洛帕c時，他的父親D. Soeiro Nunes Velho26歲，母親D. Teresa Annes de Penella22歲。他於大約1189年與D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世在葡萄牙波爾圖白奧桑塔 萊奧卡迪亞。

zh-hans.Sequeira, Braga, Braga, Portugal: 葡萄牙布拉加布拉加澤可拉
葡萄牙波爾圖白奧桑塔 萊奧卡迪亞
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado"于大约1170年出生在葡萄牙艾維洛帕c时，他的父亲D. Soeiro Nunes Velho26岁，母亲D. Teresa Annes de Penella22岁。他于大约1189年与D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世在葡萄牙波爾圖白奧桑塔 萊奧卡迪亞。

nameMeanings.name: Soares
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Luis, Francisco, Luiz, Jorge, Mario, Miguel, Pedro, Joaquin, Sergio.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Anabela, Henrique, Vasco, Agostinho, Duarte, Goncalo, Marcio, Serafim, Seraphine.
Portuguese: patronymic from the medieval personal name Sueiro, derived from Latin suarius ‘swineherd’ (see Spanish Suero ).
Spanish: northwestern variant of Suárez (see Suarez ), a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Suero
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Manuel, Fernando, Ramon, Ana, Jesus, Jorge, Julio, Luis, Orlando, Rafael.
Spanish: from the medieval personal name Suero, from Latin Suarius, from suarius ‘swineherd’, a typical nomen humilitatis (‘name as a sign of humility’) of the early Christian times.

nameMeanings.name: Velho
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Enrique, Jesus, Lino, Mario, Alvaro, Andres, Armando, Catalina, Consuelo, Fruto, Guadalupe.  Italian Antonio, Heriberto, Primo.
Galician and western Spanish: variant of Galician and Portuguese   Belo   ‘beautiful’.
Italian: habitational name from Velo d'Astico or Velo Veronese in Veneto.

variants.name: Belo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alfredo, Amalia, Armando, Emilia, Florencio, Francisca, Luiz, Nilo, Panfilo.  Portuguese Joao.
Portuguese and Galician: nickname for a handsome man (perhaps in some instances ironically for an ugly one), from belo ‘handsome’. Compare Velo and Spanish Bello .

nameMeanings.name: Pedro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" was born about 1170, in Paço, Aveiro, Portugal, his father, D. Soeiro Nunes Velho, was 26 and his mother, D. Teresa Annes de Penella, was 22. He married D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra about 1189. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died in Santa Leocádia, Baião, Porto, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" est né environ 1170, à Paço, Aveiro, Portugal, son père, D. Soeiro Nunes Velho, avait 26 ans et sa mère, D. Teresa Annes de Penella, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra environ 1189. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé à Santa Leocádia, Baião, Porto, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" um 1170 in Paço, Aveiro, Portugal geboren wurde, war sein Vater D. Soeiro Nunes Velho 26 und seine Mutter D. Teresa Annes de Penella 22. Er hat um 1189 D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb in Santa Leocádia, Baião, Porto, Portugal.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" è nato il circa 1170 nel Paço, Aveiro, Portogallo, il suo padre, D. Soeiro Nunes Velho, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, D. Teresa Annes de Penella, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra circa 1189. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel Santa Leocádia, Baião, Porto, Portogallo.

ja.lifeSummary: Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado"が約1170年にポルトガルエイベイロプアcオで生まれた時，父D. Soeiro Nunes Velhoは26歳，母D. Teresa Annes de Penellaは22歳であった。約1189年にD. Maria Vasques de Coimbraと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼はポルトガルポルトーベイaオサンタ レオクaディアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado"(이)가 대략 1170년 포르투갈 에브이로 파c오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 D. Soeiro Nunes Velho(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 D. Teresa Annes de Penella(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1189년 D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 포르투갈 포토 베이a오 산타 리옥a디아에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Paço, Aveiro, Portugal, seu pai, D. Soeiro Nunes Velho, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, D. Teresa Annes de Penella, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra aproximadamente 1189. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em Santa Leocádia, Baião, Porto, Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" родился около 1170 г. в местности паcо, авиро, Португалия, его отцу по имени D. Soeiro Nunes Velho было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали D. Teresa Annes de Penella, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra около 1189 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в местности санта леокaдя, беиaо, порто, Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" nació aproximadamente 1170, en Paço, Aveiro, Portugal, su papá, D. Soeiro Nunes Velho, tenía 26 años y su mamá, D. Teresa Annes de Penella, tenía 22 años. Se casó con D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra aproximadamente 1189. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en Santa Leocádia, Baião, Oporto, Portugal.
